name: Obsidian Media Claim
description: Optional pre-model media guard for obsidian-cli-plugins: claim media-only uploads before the LLM, stage readable attachments, and avoid unnecessary token spend.

stageAttachments.description: Stage readable local attachment paths through obsidian_workflows.py attachment-stage.

replyContent.description: Synthetic reply sent when a media-only message is claimed.

python.description: Python executable used to call obsidian_workflows.py.

obsidianWorkflowsPath.description: Absolute path to obsidian-cli-plugins/scripts/obsidian_workflows.py. The obsidian-cli-plugins skill is required for Obsidian record creation; this plugin only stages media for it.

stagedAttachmentTtlHours.description: Prune staged attachments older than this many hours before saving newly uploaded media.

onlyChannels.description: Optional allowlist of OpenClaw channel ids.

ignoredChannels.description: Optional denylist of OpenClaw channel ids.

replyDispatchGuard.description: Use reply_dispatch as the primary pre-model guard for media-only channel turns with full finalized context.

beforeDispatchFallback.description: Use before_dispatch as an early compatibility fallback for attachment-marker messages.

agentReplyFallback.description: Use before_agent_reply as a late compatibility guard to return a synthetic reply for media-only prompts not handled earlier.

pendingMediaPromptInjection.description: Inject staged media workflow guidance into later text turns that ask to record earlier videos/media/attachments.

debugLogging.description: Write detailed hook diagnostics to debugLogPath.

debugLogPath.description: Path for JSONL diagnostics. Can also be set with OBSIDIAN_MEDIA_CLAIM_DEBUG_LOG.
